rationale: The proposed change concerns a property tax homestead exemption amount under Tax Code §11.13(b). Educ. Code §38.016 governs school district employees' restrictions on psychotropic drug recommendations and psychiatric evaluations. The two provisions address entirely unrelated subjects with no operative overlap.
quote:
A school district employee may not:
(1) recommend that a student use a psychotropic drug;
_note: No conflict exists; the cited rule is wholly unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption increase.
